pattern: Rewire the tree into a right-only chain following preorder: each node's left subtree is spliced between it and its former right subtree.
hints: The target order is preorder (node, then left subtree, then right subtree), laid out entirely along right pointers with every left pointer null.
For a node with a left child, find the rightmost node of that left subtree — it must point to the node's current right subtree.
Move the left subtree to the right, null the left pointer, then continue down the new right spine; or do it bottom-up returning the tail of each flattened subtree.

stress.description: random tree with holes; flatten is well defined for any shape
stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
